description: Letter from a certain Meʾir to his 'friend and brother' Abū ʿImrān ('ha-talmid ha-navon'). In Judaeo-Arabic. The sender's hand is familiar from other documents (distinctive qofs). Dating: probably 12th or early 13th century. Announcing his arrival and greeting the trustee Abū l-Makārim, the cantor Abū Manṣūr, Abū l-Munā, and various relatives. He also requests a detailed update on the news of the country, as if he were present, "and who died." (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב ממאיר לחברו ואחיו אבו עמראן; ביהודית-ערבית; מודיע על הגעתו; מברך את האמין, החזן ואנשים אחרים; מבקש עדכון על הנעשה בארץ
